03·Product-Market Fit
The engine behind the record month
Compounding Evidence

Product-market fit is
showing up in the numbers.

We got here by tightening the product against real contractor feedback, expanding the sales workflow we capture, and shipping features customers love. Every new module now moves revenue directly.

The Loop
Ship a feature contractors love → upgrades and referrals follow → usage data sharpens the next feature. The loop is running.
+50%
MRR lift from a single feature
The Instant Quote Widget shipped into OC Premium and powered our best sales month since inception — 50% above the prior best.
49%
Demo-to-close conversion
Contractors who see the product buy it. The pain is real; the fit is proven.
4:1
Gross adds vs. drops · June 2026
36 added, 9 churned — churn held at 6.1% as the base grew to 174, before any dedicated retention effort. Our lean operation has focused entirely on growth; customer success is untapped upside this round funds.
AI
Constant, aggressive innovation
We move from ideation to deployment with AI in every step of the process — a fast-paced roadmap only possible with a lean team, deep industry expertise, and strong AI capability.

05·The Problem
Contractors are drowning in software
The Stack Tax

Eight or more tools.
$1,500+ a month.

A typical roofing contractor stitches together eight or more tools to run their sales workflow — expensive, frustrating, and inefficient. Toolsey combines AI innovation with deep industry knowledge to ingest those tools into one unified command center at a fraction of the cost — a value proposition positioned to capture tens of thousands of contractors.

Aerial MeasurementEagleView$18–87/report
Digital FormsGoCanvas$49–79/user/mo
Hail / WeatherHailTrace$50–99/mo

07·Strategic Channel
Owens Corning Partnership
Strategic Channel · Owens Corning

31,000 contractors,
one SSO away.

Owens Corning — Fortune 500 for 69 consecutive years — selected Toolsey to power OC Lead Management, deeply integrated with single sign-on into OCConnect™. Every OCCN contractor gets a Toolsey account on day one.

Why This Channel Is Advantaged
  • →Single sign-on directly inside OCConnect — zero onboarding friction
  • →Contractors pay with OC promotional dollars — reduces price sensitivity
  • →Toolsey is paid directly by Owens Corning — OC absorbs collections risk
  • →OC drives adoption via training content, email campaigns, and field reps
  • →Every Lite account is a built-in funnel into Basic, Premium, and Max

08·AI-Accelerated Build
How a small team ships at unprecedented pace
The Velocity Story

We use AI to build the product itself.

AI coding agents let us design, build, and ingest industry tools at a pace that would have required a 30-engineer roadmap two years ago. We ship monthly. The marginal cost of a new module is approaching zero.

01
Shipped This Half
Instant Quote Widget (live in OC Premium), major feature and security updates to the mobile apps — OC Lead Management and native Toolsey — eight AI skills launched, and a multi-location analytics dashboard. All built AI-first: AI UI/UX design tools paired with our in-house designer, and AI coding agents reporting to human programmers.
+50%MRR lift · quote widget launch
02
Weeks From Launch
A best-in-class AI Proposal Engine — state-of-the-art proposal generation built directly on Toolsey lead data. In final QA now; replaces $209/mo point tools on day one.
WeeksFrom production launch
03
Vertical AI Roadmap
A new AI-powered command center replacing today's dashboard, Roof Opportunity Finder — aged-roof search by territory or around any project — Website Visitor ID, and AI-driven marketing sequences. Additional AI agents throughout the system.
Q4 2026Tiered into the Max plan
~0
The marginal cost of a new industry tool inside Toolsey. AI-accelerated build is not a future-state slide — it's how Max ships by Q4 2026, and how modules like the Instant Quote Widget are lifting revenue right now.

The product manifestation of the vision · Launching Q4 2026
Toolsey Max

$279/mo

Unlimited users. Every module. One bill.

Launching Q4 2026, Max bundles every Toolsey module — lead management, AI proposals, photo capture, instant roof measurement, square reports, hail tracking, forms, visitor ID, and AI skills — into one subscription with no per-seat surcharge. Modules ship into today's plans as they complete: the Instant Quote Widget is already live in OC Premium and lifting MRR.

11 / 18
11·Structural Advantage
Early-stage is the moat
Why Small Wins Right Now

Born in the AI era, not retrofitting it.

Incumbents in contractor software are weighed down by 10+ years of legacy code, a production-operations focus, and entrenched overhead. We focus on the sales motion they treat as an afterthought — and integrate with their stack through 40+ connectors. Our moat is deep industry integration paired with direct manufacturer and supplier relationships that put Toolsey in front of massive contractor networks.

The Incumbents
ServiceTitan · AccuLynx · JobNimbus · and others
  • 10–20 years of legacy code; refactoring AI in is a multi-year program
  • Quarterly release cycles, enterprise change-management overhead
  • Per-seat pricing models locked to investor expectations
  • Focused on production and field-service workflows — sales is an afterthought
  • Distribution by direct sales reps and SaaS marketing — expensive, slow
Toolsey
Domain-native, AI-accelerated, channel-backed
  • Modern codebase architected for AI-agent development
  • Monthly module releases — new tools ingested in weeks, not years
  • Bundle pricing — Max (Q4 2026) at $279/mo replaces a $1,500+/mo stack of 8–10 disconnected tools
  • Sales-motion focused — built to win leads and close jobs, not just manage them
  • 40+ integrations across the contractor stack — JobNimbus, AccuLynx, Angi, Thumbtack, Jobber, Modernize, EagleView, GoDaddy, Squarespace, QuickBooks, and more
  • 31,000 contractors pre-provisioned through Owens Corning — distribution as a feature, not a cost

14·Growth Runway
10K Max is the first milestone — not the destination
Growth Runway

10,000 Max subs is just the first milestone.

$33.5M ARR is reachable from the integration partners we're already wired into. Behind it sits an enormous runway — the full US home services vertical, then adjacent verticals, then global markets — built on the same speed-to-lead AI playbook.

Stage 1 · Milestone
10,000 Max Subscribers
$33.5MARR
2.9% penetration of our integration-partner reach · achievable from today's blended channel mix (OC network, lead-provider co-marketing, CRM cross-sell, direct, specialty partners).
Stage 2 · Integration Reach
Contractors already wired in
350Kpros
Unique digitally-active contractors reachable through Toolsey's 40+ integration partners — Angi, Thumbtack, Jobber, JobNimbus, CompanyCam, EagleView, Porch, and more.
Stage 3 · Vertical TAM
US home services, full vertical
2.5Mpros
Every home service professional in the US — roofing, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, landscaping, painting, remodeling, siding. The full domestic vertical opportunity.
Stage 4 · Expansion
Adjacent verticals & global markets
N×vertical
Real estate · automotive · insurance · financial services · healthcare — every industry with multi-source lead flow and speed-to-lead sensitivity. International expansion follows.
